understanding.goal_understanding: Reach the goal gem tile marked '+' on each level while avoiding spikes (which end the run), using limited attempts (2 per level) and turns (50 per attempt). Progress through multiple levels to win the game.
understanding.mechanics_understanding: Movement uses MOVE_LEFT/MOVE_RIGHT to shift horizontally (1 tile); gravity (DOWN) causes falling downward after moves or removals until landing on a solid surface. CLICK removes specific clickable tiles (often blocks above/below), potentially causing the player to fall through the gap. Spikes are instant-fail hazards. No undo mechanic was observed or used in the provided turns; failed attempts restart the level with appended failure context.
